mapper.select:
SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME AS ENAME,E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS MGRNAME ,S.GRADE,D.DNAME FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL

SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME AS ENAME,E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS MGRNAME ,S.GRADE,D.DNAME FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL
WHERE 1=1 AND E1.EMPNO = #{empNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE EMPNO = #{mgrNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DEPT WHERE DEPTNO = #{deptNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP(EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, SAL, DEPTNO) VALUES(#{empNo}, #{eName}, #{job},#{mgrNo}, #{sal}, #{deptNo})
